title: Family of 4 trapped — fire 2 blocks away
sentences: Please help us, we're trapped in our house and there's a wildfire coming.
We're at 847 Creekside Drive in Woodland, near the park.
The fire is about two blocks away and moving fast toward us.
There are four of us — me, my husband, and our two kids aged 6 and 9.
We tried to leave but the road is blocked by fire trucks and we can't get through.
My youngest has asthma and is having trouble breathing from the smoke.
Embers are landing in our backyard and the fence just caught fire.
We're on the second floor waving from the window, please send someone now.
